heroSection.slogan: Plan your trip, share it, and inspire dreams with Moving.com
heroSection.fullSlogan: The platform that connects travel agencies and travelers for a smooth and secure booking experience.

customerSection.title: For Travelers
customerSection.slogan: Discover a new way to book your trips, simple, secure, and flexible.
customerSection.freeSearchText: Quickly find trips that match your criteria with our search engine.
customerSection.flexiblePaymentText: Pay partially or in full according to your budget, with secure payment options via Orange Money and Mobile Money.
customerSection.reservationManagementText: Book one or more seats, cancel or modify your reservations easily from your personal space.

statisticSection.title: Analytics and Statistics
statisticSection.slogan: Track the performance of your trips with detailed statistics and real-time analytics.
statisticSection.followUpReservationText: View the number of bookings per trip, by period and by destination. Identify your most popular trips.
statisticSection.cancellationAnalyticsText: Track cancellation rates and understand the reasons to improve your offers and reduce future cancellations.
statisticSection.commerceCustomText: Generate custom reports over a given period to analyze your performance and make informed decisions.

featureSection.title: Key features
featureSection.financialManagementDescription: Track your revenue, manage partial and full payments, and offer flexible payment options to your clients.
featureSection.integratedChatDescription: Communicate directly with your customers via our integrated chat system to answer their questions and finalize details.
featureSection.reviewSystemDescription: Receive reviews from your customers and build your reputation. Positive reviews will help attract more travelers.
featureSection.couponsAndPromotionsDescription: Create discount coupons and promotional offers to boost sales during slow periods.
featureSection.advancedSecurityDescription: Protect your data and your customers’ data with our advanced security system and secure payments.
featureSection.intuitiveInterfaceDescription: Enjoy an intuitive and easy-to-use user interface designed to simplify trip management.

agencySection.title: For Travel Agencies
agencySection.slogan: Moving.com offers travel agencies a complete platform to manage their operations and grow their customer base.

planning.title: Trip Planning
planning.description: Easily create and plan your trips with our intuitive interface. Set dates, routes, prices, and availability in just a few clicks.

publishing.title: Publishing and Management
publishing.description: Publish your trips to make them visible to potential clients. Edit or cancel trips anytime according to your needs.

tickets.title: Ticket Management
tickets.description: Create and manage tickets for your trips. Offer discount coupons to attract more customers and build loyalty.

visibility.title: International Visibility
visibility.description: Reach customers from around the world

CTASection.title: Ready to simplify your trips and bookings?
CTASection.slogan: Join Moving.com today and discover a new, easier, and more enjoyable way to manage your travels.

footer.slogan: The platform that connects travel agencies and travelers for a smooth and secure booking experience.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Discover the team behind Mooving, an innovative platform created by students passionate about technology and travel.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to revolutionize the travel industry by creating a modern platform that connects travel agencies and travelers, for a smooth and secure booking experience.

education.title: Education
education.description: Our project is part of our academic journey, allowing us to apply our theoretical knowledge to a concrete case.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We use the latest technologies to create a modern and efficient solution for the travel industry.

global.title: Global Vision
global.description: Our platform is designed to connect travelers and agencies from around the world, without geographical barriers.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Our love for travel and technology is the driving force that pushes us to create the best possible experience.

story.title: How It All Started
story.paragraph1: Mooving was born from a university project launched in September 2024 by six computer science students passionate about travel and technology
story.paragraph3: The project was initiated by one of our professors, and we adapted it to our aspirations. Our work quickly evolved from a simple idea into a functional platform that we develop with passion and determination..

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Meet the creative minds behind Mooving. Our team consists of four computer science students, each bringing their expertise and passion.

member1.name: ATABONG Stephane
member1.description: Atabong is an experienced project manager, specializing in the planning and organization of complex projects. She ensures that all aspects of the project are aligned with the strategic goals of the team and facilitates effective communication among all team members.

member2.name: NGOUPAYE Thierry
member2.description: Specialized in web development with Next.js and TypeScript, Ngoupaye is responsible for the architecture and front-end development of our platform. She creates intuitive and aesthetically pleasing interfaces that enhance user experience.

member3.name: TCHASSI Daniel
member3.description: Tchassi is an expert in DevOps, mastering deployment, continuous integration, and continuous delivery (CI/CD) technologies. He manages the cloud infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and monitoring tools to ensure the reliability and performance of our platform.

member4.name: FOMEKONG Jonathan
member4.description: Passionate about databases and security, Fomekong has developed a robust API and secure reservation systems. He ensures that our backend is performant and reliable, offering a smooth and secure user experience.

member5.name: STEVE Ulrich
member5.description: With her eye for design and attention to detail, Steve creates intuitive and aesthetically pleasing interfaces that enhance user experience. She works closely with the development team to ensure that designs are both functional and appealing.

member6.name: WOTCHOKO
member6.description: With her eye for design and attention to detail, Wotchoko creates intuitive and aesthetically pleasing interfaces that enhance user experience. She works closely with the development team to ensure that designs are both functional and appealing.

tech.title: Our Technologies
tech.description: We use a modern technology stack to deliver a robust, fast, and pleasant-to-use platform.

contact.title: Want to get in touch?
contact.description: Whether you're a travel agency interested in our solution or a student curious to learn more about our project, we'd love to hear from you!
